steps.text: Add a slash usage command that shows context budget

caption.en: Press mic. Speak. Watch the prompt fill.
caption.cs: Stiskni mikrofon. Mluv. Sleduj, jak se prompt vyplňuje.

alt: Claude desktop app with microphone activated mid-dictation, transcribed text 'Add a slash usage command' in the prompt area.

caption.en: Drag a screenshot in. Claude sees what you see.
caption.cs: Přetáhni screenshot. Claude vidí to, co ty.

alt: Claude desktop app with a pasted error screenshot thumbnail in the prompt area and the question 'What's wrong here?' typed below.

caption.en: Wispr Flow turns voice into text in any app.
caption.cs: Wispr Flow promění hlas v text v jakékoli aplikaci.

alt: Wispr Flow menu bar dropdown showing live transcription with a recent dictation snippet visible.
